summary: Comprehensive UI testing of MorphoVet Expo React Native web app. All key features are working correctly: Study Mode shows all bone markers positioned on skull images with selection interaction, Exam/Quiz Mode shows single marker with multiple choice options, navigation flow works end-to-end.

issues: data-testid attributes not working for React Native Web - markers render visually but Playwright cannot find them via data-testid selector. This is a React Native Web limitation, not a bug.

study_mode_dorsal.markers_visible: 8 colored markers visible as small dots on skull image
study_mode_dorsal.selection_works: Clicking bone name enlarges marker and shows detail panel
study_mode_dorsal.bone_list: All 8 bones listed: Cresta Sagital Externa, Hueso Parietal, Hueso Frontal, Agujero Supraorbitario, Hueso Nasal, Procesos Rostrales del Nasal, Hueso Incisivo, Procesos Palatinos del Incisivo

study_mode_lateral.markers_visible: 18 colored markers visible on skull image
study_mode_lateral.selection_works: Bone selection and detail panel working

study_mode_ventral.markers_visible: 22 colored markers visible on ventral skull image
study_mode_ventral.bone_names: Diastema, Canal Interincisivo, Vomer, Foramen Magno, Condilos all present

general_skull_study.markers_visible: 15 colored markers visible on general skull image
general_skull_study.title: Craneo y Cara - Modo Estudio
general_skull_study.bone_list: All major bones listed including Frontal, Parietal, Temporal, Maxilar, Mandibula

exam_mode_dorsal.single_marker: Single colored marker shown (varies per question)
exam_mode_dorsal.options: 4 multiple choice options (A, B, C, D) displayed
exam_mode_dorsal.confirmar_button: Confirmar button visible and enabled after selection

steps: Caballo → Esqueleto Axial, Esqueleto Apendicular divisions
Esqueleto Axial → Craneo y Cara, Cabeza y Cuello, Tronco, Columna, Torax
Each view shows Estudiar and Examen buttons

marker_positioning.dorsal_view: 8 markers correctly positioned - Cresta at back, Parietal behind frontal, Frontal on forehead, Supraorbitario near orbit, Nasal on nose bridge, Rostrales and Incisivo at front
marker_positioning.lateral_view: 18 markers correctly positioned across lateral skull profile
marker_positioning.ventral_view: 22 markers correctly positioned on ventral skull surface
marker_positioning.general_skull: 15 markers correctly positioned on general skull image

critical_code_review_comments: ZoomableImage calculates actual image rendering bounds within container to position markers correctly for letterboxing - this is working well
Markers use Pressable components for tap-to-select functionality - working correctly
ExamShared uses ZoomableImage with single marker overlay - working correctly

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend testing skipped per request

seed_data_creation: None - fully offline app with bundled data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features from the test request have been verified and are working correctly. Study Mode shows all markers as colored dots that enlarge when selected. Exam Mode shows single marker with question, hint, and 4 options. Navigation flow is complete. The app uses expo-router for file-based routing. Key routes: /study-view/horse/axial/craneo/[viewId], /exam-view/horse/axial/craneo/[viewId], /study/horse/axial/craneo. Images load correctly with proper marker positioning using ZoomableImage component that handles letterboxing.
